lint.command: No lint script is defined in package.json or .factory/services.yaml for this repo.

blockingIssues.description: When bootstrap fails with residual seeded snapshots, diagnostics always report `source_class: "seeded_bootstrap"` for any seeded snapshot and never distinguish failed degraded boot from ordinary startup. The feature description requires hot endpoints and `/diagnostics/runtime` to agree on one declared degraded-boot policy with stable source-class evidence. After this commit, readiness becomes `degraded`, but the response still exposes the same source class and `stale_live_enabled` flag shape used for non-failed startup, so the diagnostics surface does not actually carry distinct degraded-boot evidence for VAL-CROSS-001/feature expectations.

When `/coins/markets` serves seeded-bootstrap fallback rows, only requested `price_change_percentage_*_in_currency` fields are nulled. The default `price_change_percentage_24h_in_currency` field is still produced by the surrounding row builder via the standard row contract, so degraded rows can continue exposing a market-change value even though the feature's chosen policy nulls degraded market-value fields. The new regression in `tests/stale-data.test.ts` only checks `price_change_percentage_24h`, not the always-present `price_change_percentage_24h_in_currency`, so this compatibility gap is untested and can leak fresh-looking degraded data.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify worker/handoff guidance for inherited-branch or fix-follow-up sessions so reported commit IDs must point to a feature-attributable diff or explicitly explain when current behavior depends on multiple prior commits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl session 87156602-5e6c-43db-a459-95a613c382e3 ends with commit c0c00e96768e00aa6ee85c9f5b913ec7b8a2d665, while `git show --stat c0c00e96768e00aa6ee85c9f5b913ec7b8a2d665` only contains .factory/validation/operational-controls/user-testing artifacts. The actual startup-prewarm implementation and fixes are attributable to f5bde92, 84c94b0, and fd3c6ff.

rejectedObservations.observation: The mission/library guidance says fallback work should extend `src/modules/market-freshness.ts`, but this feature encoded degraded-bootstrap classification partly in `src/services/runtime-diagnostics.ts` using runtime failure reason plus snapshot ownership. That convention is not documented clearly enough for future workers deciding where fallback/source-class policy should live.
